Prof. Dr. Assist. Prof. Dr. Petek Tosun, Department of Business Administration

Petek Tosun graduated from Bilkent University, Department of Economics with a full scholarship in 2000. Between 2000 and 2016, she worked as a product manager, segment manager and marketing manager in the financial services sector. She received her MBA degree from Istanbul Bilgi University in 2013 and her PhD degree in Business Administration/Marketing in 2018.

Since 2016, she started teaching business and marketing courses at undergraduate and graduate level at universities. Petek Tosun, who was an Assistant Professor at MEF University Department of Business Administration between 2019-2022, joins KHAS Department of Business Administration as an Assistant Professor.

His research interests mainly focus on consumer behavior, service marketing, marketing management and sustainability.
